title: Deus Ex:Minecraft's Conspiracy
description:
Use MCreator to make Deus Ex 2000 come true in mincraft!!!
Add some weapons(GEP GUN!!!) some npcs and some materials.
body:
![JC BOB PAGE AND GUNTHER](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f96cb20e4ad2a33121cfa2477dd0540b902a3878.png)
![Nano Augmentation Interface](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b6c06fcd94bf03051a49bed55eb05f18474aebe.jpeg)

The mod features four main NPCs from the original Deus Ex: JC Denton, Gunther Herman, Walter Simmons, and Bob Page, with JC spawning in the Overworld and the remaining three characters spawning in the Nether as they died in the original game. There is also a type of UNATCO soldier that spawns in the Overworld, has a fast attack stick and shield, and drops bread when killed.

There are also three weapons in the mod: baton, dragon tooth sword, and GEP GUN, all of which have 3D models, but the GEP GUN's model is rough and the texture stretches when viewed from third person, but it uses vanilla textures. Both baton and DTS are models that I made myself, and you can see them in the game.

And then there's the nano enhancement part I'm most proud of, so far I've only made 6 kinds of enhancements that the original version has, you need to collect nano ore "Nanite" to make the most basic nano liquid, and then use the means of nano liquid and the original Minecraft to make different enhancement modules, 4 of which have advanced versions, which need to be crafted by making nano upgrade liquid, and you need to use a T2 implant assembly table to use, The T1 assembly table can only be used with white basic grade implants. These implants will give you different buffs, such as jump boosts, strength, night vision, etc., and they will last for 10 days (real-time because I use the loop will cause the mod to crash, I guess no one will play Minecraft for 10 days in a row), but if your effects are gone, reinstalling the booster module is a good option.

The Nanite mentioned above appears as a nanobot in the vanilla game, but I can't add this nano-sized bot to my world for you to fight them to get a nanite, so I added an ore that needs to be mined with a diamond level, which will spawn below the height of y=0 in the Overworld, and after you collect it, you need to put it into a block called the Fossil Analyzer to analyze it and get the nanite, but if you put something else into the analyzer, You'll get a bunch of burnt powder, as well as destroy the items you put in, so be careful!

By the way, if you don't know how to use the GEP gun to fire rockets, it's a good option to hold the rockets in your off-hand, and you'll love this

Tips:Need Polymorph for crafting the Nano-Augs
